programme.title: Man of the Forest
programme.desc: The kidnapping of an heir to a ranch goes awry when the Man of the Forest mistrusted by the heiress takes matters into his own hands with the help of his pet cougar

programme.title: Song of the Gringo
programme.desc: Several miners are killed and their mines are confiscated by a mysterious person Tex an undercover cop is asked to investigate the murders However Tex ends up being implicated as a criminal

programme.title: The Old Spanish Trail
programme.desc:
The Old Spanish Trail is a documentary film about the historic trail tracking the journey of Richard Waller Otis Calef and Jim Clark on horseback 1200 miles from Los Angeles to Santa Fe They rode the trail in two legs fall of 2014 and summer of 2015
The Old Spanish Trail witnessed a brief but furious heyday between 1830 and 1848 as a trade route linking Santa Fe New Mexico and Los Angeles California The riders run into problems staying true to trail because of highways and private land during their ride tracing the past The film is a reminder to all of us to protect and preserve the natural landscape and its trails

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Adventures of Young Indiana Jones Winds of Change
programme.desc: May 1919 Indy is in Paris working as a translator during the peace conference following the end of the Great War He meets up with TE Lawrence once more but finds his ideals have changed a lot since the start of the war Indy then decides to finally head home to Princeton even though it means having to face his father He gets reacquainted with his childhood friend Paul Robeson who becomes the subject of racism as they visit New York city

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Daniel Boone Trailblazer
programme.desc: Daniel Boone leads settlers into Kentucky but must battle Shawnee Indians who have been persuaded by a French renegade that Boone and the settlers are there to kill them and steal their land

programme.desc: Broken Arrow

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A Springwood High student is summoned to the principals office and begins having nightmares leading him to the schools surprising secret Another student dreams about failing his SATs

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: The gold-digging landowner of a Caribbean villa attempts to woo a haughty rich young woman with the aid of a potion made by his ex-lover; a voodoo priestess But trouble ensues when he ignores the warnings about the potion

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A married couple is trying to enjoy their anniversary However the husband is sure his wife is cheating on him

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Small-time crook Mickey aspires to work as a runner for drug lord Joey Stregga To achieve this aim Mickey sets up his innocent ex-hooker girlfriend Pearl on a date with Stregga but pays heavily for betraying her pure love for him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric sets out after Janos Skorzeny following the rumors of a Bigfoot sighting After a ferocious battle with a stronger werewolf Eric finds sanctuary in the home with a woman named Mary who has a strange and supernatural secret of her own

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks safe haven in a monastery but the monks there have secrets of their own In the past the werewolf Skorzeny paid a visit to the monastery and turned at least one of the monks

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A woman targetted in a mob hit in Chinatown escapes but in critical condition Now Nick must find her before the mobsters do

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan pose as members of a religious sect to track down a patchwork quilt that is thought to have deadly powers

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A Colonel and his young daughter are visiting Camp Henderson While befriending the little girl Pyle has no problem getting her and himself in trouble with everyone

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sgt Carter is chosen to appear in a documentary but becomes an absurd camera hog leaving producers no choice but to follow Gomer performing punishments Carter doles out

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Latin American dictator is exiled to the island and he immediately declares himself dictator of the island with Gilligan as his puppet leader in training

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A satellite bound for Mars lands on the island The castaways hope to use it to provide visual evidence to the world that they are still alive

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: A multi-talented photographer obtains the McCoys permission to take pictures of their farm but Luke becomes jealous when he seems to be focusing most of his attention on Kate

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: A multi-talented photographer obtains the McCoys permission to take pictures of their farm but Luke becomes jealous when he seems to be focusing most of his attention on Kate

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: The Hi-Ballers under new leader Riker are relentless in their pursuit of BJ and the Piston Packin Mamas especially after word gets out that BJ Snow White and the lady truckers are hauling truckloads of money for the Treasury Dept

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed volunteers to be shot into outer space

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Through Rogers trickery Ed believes that he has a shameful heritage so he runs away from home

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Learning that the German army is manufacturing an improved Tiger tank Hogan and his men are determined to steal one so they can disassemble it and make blueprints for the Allies

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan concocts a Kommandant of the Year award to distract Klink so a new Nazi rocket being stored protectively at Stalag 13 can be sabotaged

programme.title: Mchale 327
programme.desc: Mchale 327

programme.title: Mchale 407
programme.desc: Mchale 407

programme.title: Genghis Khan
programme.desc: During the thirteenth century the shy Mongol boy Temujin Carlo Cura becomes the fearless leader Genghis Khan Omar Sharif who unites all Mongol tribes and conquers most of Asia Europe and the Middle East

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: In 1944 a German sergeant gets involved in an anti-Hitler conspiracy and saves the life of an American colonel

programme.title: Mozambique 1964
programme.desc: An out-of-work and penniless American pilot is offered work in Mozambique and promptly becomes an unwitting pawn in a world of drug smuggling kidnap and murder

programme.title: The Perfect Weapon
programme.desc: An expert in kenpo karate avenges his Koreatown friend slain by a mobster in Los Angeles

programme.title: The Retriever
programme.desc: A martial artist Max Thayer flees with an ex-agents manuscript and sister Shawn Hoskins while on a mission for the CIA

programme.title: Sleepaway Camp
programme.desc: Bunks and showers are a mad stabbers beat at a summer camp strictly for teens

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Henry Flatt a man the Dukes know whom is believed to be dead shows up alive He faked his death because he took some money from Boss Hogg and to avoid his wrath which included a burial at the local cemetery He learned that because no one has been buried at the cemetery for some time Boss can get the land to use for one of his projects and when he digs up his grave Boss will know he is not dead So he sets out to put another body in his grave so he gets an unclaimed body And the Dukes try to help him before things get out of hand

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Navy Seal major Raymond McIntyre kidnaps Daan and demands to know where his men are They were involved in a inter-dimensional space flight test that went wrong

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens plan to disorganise human society by paralysing its means of communication

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans land on the planet Arkadia where glyphs suggest it is the cradle of civilisation from which life on Earth began Now it is desolate and Koenig feels it is unsuitable for colonisation Two renegade crew members have other ideas however and take Helena hostage in their demands to settle on Arkadia

programme.title: Godzilla Vs Mechagodzilla II
programme.desc: The United Nations assembles the ultimate weapon to defeat Godzilla while scientists discover a fresh pteranodon egg on a remote Japanese island

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Arrested and accused of robbery in Lone Butte Cheyenne escapes to clear his name The only clues he has are the location of the gangs well-guarded hideout and that the killer was wearing an unusual gold lions head belt buckle

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: In order to stop a psychotic priest killer Lt Stone goes undercover as a Roman Catholic priest The victims were all clergymen who studied at the same seminary

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Phelps Co continue their plan to smash the renegade slavery operation of the absolute ruler of a Middle Eastern nation Phelps posing as a slave trader works his way into the confidence of the ruler In that role Phelps sells Cinnamon into slavery Meanwhile the rest of the IMF team is preparing to pull a switch that will force the rulers brother to confront the situation and force the end of slavery in his nation

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: In this episode, Melissa Croden speaks about some of the things she struggles with as a fighter and how she overcomes those obstacles. Find out how Melissa started out this fight with nerves and anxiety but how she pulled out a huge win against Brittany Paterson.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Adam Zarrillo v. Mike Papesquash.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Fransisco Azevendo as we delve into the life of a coach.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.desc: When a giant robot designed to protect humanity from the Renegades turns against its creators the Renegades are quick to take advantage of the situation

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Lightning League visits a planet which harbours the greatest computer ever built hoping its terminals hold information on Audrics whereabouts The computer Logos keeps switching Audric back and forth between helping and fighting Jayce

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian leads the ship and Jayce to where all time meets and one can see into the future After passing several secret tests that show his goodness and courage Jayce is allowed to see his future which shows his father being destroyed

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kid Icarus feels awful because his height is a problem Duke discovers a magic lamp and the genie grants Kid Icaruss wish to become bigger Kid Icarus turns into a giant and comes to realize that being bigger has a lot of disadvantages

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dragon Lord and Mother Brain try to turn every dragon evil The N team rescues Puff a white last good dragon baby

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD try to stop Gadget from attending the International Congress of Policemen in London

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain go to an Old Wild West amusement park to stop a MAD plot to make the park their new headquarters
